mapper.insert:
SELECT CONCAT_WS('-', extract('YEAR' from now())::text, 'TBM', to_char(coalesce(max(doc_no)::int, 0) + 1, 'FM00000')) FROM esg.tb_toolboxmeeting WHERE write_year = extract('YEAR' from now())::text AND doc_type = 'TBM'
INSERT INTO esg.tb_toolboxmeeting ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, comp_id, tbm_date, tbm_time_stt, tbm_time_end, same_date_yn, work_nm, work_desc, work_place, risk_yn, check_result, work_end_meeting, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES( split_part(#{id}, '-', 1), 'TBM', split_part(#{id}, '-', 3), #{compId}, to_char(#{startedAt}::timestamp, 'YYYYMMDD'), to_char(#{startedAt}::timestamp, 'HH24MI'), to_char(#{endedAt}::timestamp, 'HH24MI'), CASE WHEN #{sameWorkingDate}::bool THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END, #{work.name}, #{work.content}, #{location}, CASE WHEN #{includedRiskAssessment}::bool THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END, #{checkResult}, #{endMeeting}, 'Y', now(), #{createdBy} ) ;
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_toolboxmeeting SET tbm_date = to_char(#{startedAt}::timestamp, 'YYYYMMDD'), tbm_time_stt = to_char(#{startedAt}::timestamp, 'HH24MI'), tbm_time_end = to_char(#{endedAt}::timestamp, 'HH24MI'), same_date_yn = case when #{sameWorkingDate}::bool then 'Y' else 'N' end, work_nm = #{work.name}, work_desc = #{work.content}, work_place = #{location}, risk_yn = case when #{includedRiskAssessment}::bool then 'Y' else 'N' end, check_result = #{checkResult}, work_end_meeting = #{endMeeting}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{createdBy} WHERE CONCAT_WS('-', write_year, doc_type, doc_no) = #{id} ;

DELETE FROM esg.tb_toolboxmeeting_potentialrisk WHERE CONCAT_WS('-', write_year, doc_type, doc_no) = #{id} AND doc_seq not in (
split_part(coalesce(#{factor.potentialId}, ''), '-', 4),
'' ) ;
DELETE FROM esg.tb_toolboxmeeting_keyrisk WHERE CONCAT_WS('-', write_year, doc_type, doc_no) = #{id} AND doc_seq not in (
split_part(coalesce(#{factor.importantId}, ''), '-', 4),
'' ) ;
DELETE FROM esg.tb_toolboxmeeting_safecheck WHERE CONCAT_WS('-', write_year, doc_type, doc_no) = #{id} AND doc_seq not in (
split_part(coalesce(#{factor.safetyCheckId}, ''), '-', 4),
split_part(coalesce(#{check.safetyCheckId}, ''), '-', 4),
'' ) ;
WITH risks AS ( SELECT split_part(#{id}, '-', 1) AS write_year, 'TBM' AS doc_type, split_part(#{id}, '-', 3) AS doc_no, CASE WHEN src.p_seq = '' THEN to_char(p.max_seq + row_number() OVER(PARTITION BY src.p_seq = ''),'FM00000') ELSE src.p_seq END AS potential_risk_seq, CASE WHEN src.k_seq = '' and src.important THEN to_char(k.max_seq + row_number() OVER(PARTITION BY src.k_seq = '' and src.important),'FM00000') ELSE src.k_seq END AS key_risk_seq, CASE WHEN src.s_seq = '' THEN to_char(s.max_seq + row_number() OVER(PARTITION BY src.s_seq = ''),'FM00000') ELSE src.s_seq END AS safecheck_seq, src.risk, src.measures, src.important, src.actioned, src."action", CASE WHEN src.measures_eff THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS effective_measures_yn FROM ( VALUES
( split_part(coalesce(#{factor.potentialId}, ''), '-', 4), split_part(coalesce(#{factor.importantId}, ''), '-', 4), split_part(coalesce(#{factor.safetyCheckId}, ''), '-', 4), #{factor.content}, #{factor.potentialMeasures}, #{factor.important}::bool, #{factor.actioned}::bool, #{factor.action}, #{factor.effectiveMeasures}::bool ),
(NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, false, false, NULL, false) ) AS src(p_seq, k_seq, s_seq, risk, measures, important, actioned, "action", measures_eff) JOIN ( SELECT coalesce(max(doc_seq)::int, 0) AS max_seq FROM esg.tb_toolboxmeeting_potentialrisk WHERE CONCAT_WS('-', write_year, doc_type, doc_no) = #{id} ) AS p ON true JOIN ( SELECT coalesce(max(doc_seq)::int, 0) AS max_seq FROM esg.tb_toolboxmeeting_keyrisk WHERE CONCAT_WS('-', write_year, doc_type, doc_no) = #{id} ) AS k ON true JOIN ( SELECT coalesce(max(doc_seq)::int, 0) AS max_seq FROM esg.tb_toolboxmeeting_safecheck WHERE CONCAT_WS('-', write_year, doc_type, doc_no) = #{id} ) AS s ON true where p_seq is not null ), insert_1 AS ( INSERT INTO esg.tb_toolboxmeeting_potentialrisk AS tgt ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, risk, measures, created_at, created_by ) SELECT src.write_year, src.doc_type, src.doc_no, src.potential_risk_seq, src.risk, src.measures, now(), #{createdBy} FROM risks AS src ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT tb_toolboxmeeting_potentialrisk_pk DO UPDATE SET risk = EXCLUDED.risk, measures = EXCLUDED.measures, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{createdBy} WHERE (tgt.risk != EXCLUDED.risk) IS NOT FALSE OR (tgt.measures != EXCLUDED.measures) IS NOT FALSE ), insert_2 AS ( INSERT INTO esg.tb_toolboxmeeting_keyrisk AS tgt ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, potential_risk_seq, measures, effective_measures_yn, created_at, created_by ) SELECT src.write_year, src.doc_type, src.doc_no, src.key_risk_seq, src.potential_risk_seq, src.measures, src.effective_measures_yn, now(), #{createdBy} FROM risks AS src WHERE src.important ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT tb_toolboxmeeting_keyrisk_pk DO UPDATE SET measures = EXCLUDED.measures, effective_measures_yn = EXCLUDED.effective_measures_yn, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{createdBy} WHERE (tgt.measures != EXCLUDED.measures) IS NOT FALSE OR (tgt.effective_measures_yn != EXCLUDED.effective_measures_yn) IS NOT FALSE ) INSERT INTO esg.tb_toolboxmeeting_safecheck AS tgt ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, potential_risk_seq, action_yn, "action", risk, created_at, created_by ) SELECT src.write_year, src.doc_type, src.doc_no, src.safecheck_seq, src.potential_risk_seq, case when src.actioned then 'Y' else 'N' end, src."action", src.risk, now(), #{createdBy} FROM risks AS src ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT tb_toolboxmeeting_safecheck_pk DO UPDATE SET action_yn = EXCLUDED.action_yn, "action" = EXCLUDED."action", risk = EXCLUDED.risk, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{createdBy} WHERE tgt.action_yn != EXCLUDED.action_yn OR (tgt."action" != EXCLUDED."action") IS NOT FALSE OR (tgt.risk != EXCLUDED.risk) IS NOT FALSE ; INSERT INTO esg.tb_toolboxmeeting_safecheck AS tgt ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, potential_risk_seq, action_yn, "action", risk, created_at, created_by ) SELECT src.write_year, src.doc_type, src.doc_no, case when src.doc_seq = '' then to_char(s.max_seq + row_number() OVER(PARTITION BY src.doc_seq = ''),'FM00000') else src.doc_seq end, '', CASE WHEN src.actioned THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END, src."action", src.risk, now(), #{createdBy} FROM ( VALUES
( split_part(#{id}, '-', 1), 'TBM', split_part(#{id}, '-', 3), split_part(coalesce(#{check.safetyCheckId}, ''), '-', 4), #{check.actioned}::bool, #{check.action}, #{check.content} ),
(NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, false, NULL, NULL) ) AS src(write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, actioned, "action", risk) JOIN ( SELECT coalesce(max(doc_seq)::int, 0) AS max_seq FROM esg.tb_toolboxmeeting_safecheck WHERE CONCAT_WS('-', write_year, doc_type, doc_no) = #{id} ) s ON src.write_year IS NOT NULL ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT tb_toolboxmeeting_safecheck_pk DO UPDATE SET action_yn = EXCLUDED.action_yn, "action" = EXCLUDED."action", risk = EXCLUDED.risk, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{createdBy} WHERE tgt.action_yn != EXCLUDED.action_yn OR (tgt."action" != EXCLUDED."action") IS NOT FALSE OR (tgt.risk != EXCLUDED.risk) IS NOT FALSE ;
mapper.select: WITH tbm AS ( -- 대상 TBM 조회 SELECT t.write_year, t.doc_type, t.doc_no, t.work_nm, t.work_desc, t.work_place, CASE WHEN t.same_date_yn = 'Y' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is_same_date, CASE WHEN t.risk_yn = 'Y' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is_risk, t.check_result, t.work_end_meeting, CASE WHEN t.tbm_date IS NOT NULL AND t.tbm_time_stt IS NOT NULL THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(t.tbm_date || ' ' || LPAD(t.tbm_time_stt, 4, '0'), 'YYYYMMDD HH24MI')::timestamp ELSE NULL END AS started_at, CASE WHEN t.tbm_date IS NOT NULL AND t.tbm_time_end IS NOT NULL THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(t.tbm_date || ' ' || LPAD(t.tbm_time_end, 4, '0'), 'YYYYMMDD HH24MI')::timestamp ELSE NULL END AS ended_at, t.created_at FROM esg.tb_toolboxmeeting t WHERE CONCAT_WS('-', t.write_year, t.doc_type, t.doc_no) = #{id} ), participants AS ( -- 담당자, 서명자 서명 정보 질의 SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'leader' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leader_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'attend' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS attendee_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'leader' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signed_leader_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'attend' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signed_attendee_count, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'leader' THEN ai.hr_id ELSE NULL END) AS leader_hr_id, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'leader' THEN ai.hr_nm ELSE NULL END) AS leader_name, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'leader' THEN ai.jbrp_nm ELSE NULL END) AS leader_job_title, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'leader' THEN ai.orgn_nm ELSE NULL END) AS leader_org_name, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'leader' THEN f.file_id ELSE NULL END) AS leader_logo_id, bool_or(ai.type = 'leader' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL) AS leader_signed, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.hr_id = #{hrId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS my_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.hr_id = #{hrId} AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signed_my_count FROM esg.tb_approval_info ai JOIN tbm t ON ai.target_type = t.doc_type AND ai.target_id = CONCAT(t.write_year, t.doc_no) LEFT JOIN ESG.tb_sys_file f ON f.target_id = ai.hr_id AND f.target_type = 'hrImg' ), attendees AS ( SELECT COALESCE(json_agg( json_build_object( 'hrId', ai.hr_id, 'hrNm', ai.hr_nm, 'orgnNm', ai.orgn_nm, 'jbrpNm', ai.jbrp_nm, 'logoId', f.file_id, 'signed', ai.signature IS NOT NULL ) ), '[]'::json) AS attendees FROM esg.tb_approval_info ai JOIN tbm t ON ai.target_type = t.doc_type AND ai.target_id = CONCAT(t.write_year, t.doc_no) AND ai.type = 'attend' LEFT JOIN ESG.tb_sys_file f ON f.target_id = ai.hr_id AND f.target_type = 'hrImg' ), risk_factors AS ( -- 잠재위험요인, 중점위험요인과 조치 정보 조회 SELECT COALESCE(json_agg( json_build_object( 'potentialId', CONCAT_WS('-', p.write_year, p.doc_type, p.doc_no, p.doc_seq), -- 잠재위험요인 ID 'importantId', CASE WHEN k.potential_risk_seq IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT_WS('-', k.write_year, k.doc_type, k.doc_no, k.doc_seq) ELSE NULL END, -- 중점위험요인 ID 'content', p.risk, -- 위험요인 내용 'potentialMeasures', p.measures, -- 잠재위험요인일때 대책 'importantMeasures', k.measures, -- 중점위험요인일때 대책 'effectiveMeasures', CASE WHEN k.effective_measures_yn = 'Y' THEN TRUE WHEN k.effective_measures_yn = 'N' THEN FALSE ELSE NULL END, -- 중점위험요인 대책이 효과적이였는지 'safetyCheckId', CASE WHEN s.doc_seq IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT_WS('-', s.write_year, s.doc_type, s.doc_no, s.doc_seq) ELSE NULL END, -- 안전조치 ID 'actioned', CASE WHEN s.action_yn = 'Y' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END, -- 조치완료 또는 예정 'action', s.action, -- 조치 예정일때 조치내용 'createdAt', p.created_at -- 위험요인 생성일 ) ORDER BY k.doc_seq ), '[]'::json) AS factors FROM esg.tb_toolboxmeeting_potentialrisk p JOIN tbm t ON p.write_year = t.write_year AND p.doc_type = t.doc_type AND p.doc_no = t.doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_toolboxmeeting_keyrisk k ON p.write_year = k.write_year AND p.doc_type = k.doc_type AND p.doc_no = k.doc_no AND p.doc_seq = k.potential_risk_seq LEFT JOIN esg.tb_toolboxmeeting_safecheck s ON p.write_year = s.write_year AND p.doc_type = s.doc_type AND p.doc_no = s.doc_no AND p.doc_seq = s.potential_risk_seq ), safety_check AS ( SELECT COALESCE(json_agg( json_build_object( 'potentialId', CONCAT_WS('-', s.write_year, s.doc_type, s.doc_no, s.potential_risk_seq), -- 잠재위험요인 ID 'safetyCheckId', CONCAT_WS('-', s.write_year, s.doc_type, s.doc_no, s.doc_seq), -- 안전조치 ID 'content', s.risk, -- 위험요인 내용 'actioned', CASE WHEN s.action_yn = 'Y' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END, -- 조치완료 또는 예정 'action', s.action, -- 조치 예정일때 조치내용 'createdAt', s.created_at -- 안전조치 생성일시 ) ORDER BY s.doc_seq ), '[]'::json) AS check_items FROM esg.tb_toolboxmeeting_safecheck s JOIN tbm t ON s.write_year = t.write_year AND s.doc_type = t.doc_type AND s.doc_no = t.doc_no AND s.potential_risk_seq = '' IS NOT FALSE ) SELECT CONCAT_WS('-', t.write_year, t.doc_type, t.doc_no) AS id, t.work_place AS location, json_build_object( 'name', t.work_nm, 'content', t.work_desc ) AS work, t.is_same_date AS sameWorkingDate, t.is_risk AS includedRiskAssessment, t.check_result AS checkResult, t.work_end_meeting AS endMeeting, t.started_at AS startedAt, t.ended_at AS endedAt, f.factors AS riskFactors, s.check_items AS safetyCheckItems, a.attendees, json_build_object( 'attendee', p.attendee_count, 'signedAttendee', p.signed_attendee_count, 'leader', p.leader_count, 'signedLeader', p.signed_leader_count ) AS participantCount, CASE WHEN p.leader_hr_id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object( 'hrId', p.leader_hr_id, 'hrNm', p.leader_name, 'jbrpNm', p.leader_job_title, 'orgnNm', p.leader_org_name, 'logoId', p.leader_logo_id, 'signed', p.leader_signed ) ELSE NULL END AS leader, CASE WHEN p.my_count > 0 THEN CASE WHEN p.my_count > p.signed_my_count THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END ELSE NULL END AS signed, CASE WHEN t.check_result IS NULL THEN 'safetyCheck' WHEN t.work_end_meeting IS NULL THEN 'meeting' WHEN p.attendee_count != p.signed_attendee_count THEN 'waitSigns' WHEN p.leader_signed IS FALSE THEN 'leaderSigns' ELSE 'done' END AS status, t.created_at FROM tbm t LEFT JOIN risk_factors f ON TRUE LEFT JOIN safety_check s ON TRUE LEFT JOIN participants p ON TRUE LEFT JOIN attendees a ON TRUE ;
